title: Drift Frame
description: A drift frame (2b): the platform's reconciliation detected that a greenhouse's intended setpoints differ from what the controller reports. The SPA patches greenhouseSummary.drift in the fleet cache and raises a drift event (frontend data model §5). Greenhouse-scoped — the envelope zone_id is null.

drift.description: True when intended setpoints differ from the controller's reported state; false when reconciled.

zone_id.description: Always null: drift is reported at greenhouse scope.
